tasks.title: stop_prompt broken — PID stored after process exits
tasks.notes: PID now extracted in stdout data handlers (strategy.ts + ssh.ts). clearStoredPid called in close/error handlers. extractAndStorePid still exported for unit tests and integration mocks. 1019 tests pass.

tasks.title: windows.ts hardcodes Claude flag for all providers
tasks.notes: Added permissionModeAutoFlag(): string|null to ProviderAdapter interface. Claude→'--permission-mode auto', Gemini→null, Codex→'--ask-for-approval auto-edit', Copilot→null+warning. windows.ts now delegates. 1019 tests pass.

tasks.title: windowsHide:true to suppress cmd.exe flashes on Windows local members
tasks.notes: Added windowsHide:true to spawn options in LocalStrategy.execCommand. Test added in strategy.test.ts using source inspection (ESM namespace not configurable for vi.spyOn). 11 strategy tests pass.

tasks.title: Verify Phase 1
tasks.notes: npm run build: 0 errors. npm test: 61 test files, 1020 passed, 7 skipped, 0 failures. T7: PID in data handlers confirmed. T8: windows.ts delegates auto flag confirmed. T11: windowsHide:true in spawn confirmed. Pushed to origin.

tasks.title: Structured logging for execute_prompt and execute_command
tasks.notes: Added src/utils/log-helpers.ts with logLine/maskSecrets/truncateForLog. execute-prompt.ts: entry+exit logs (exit code + elapsed ms). execute-command.ts: entry log. strategy.ts: local child.pid log, updated LLM_PID log to execute_prompt format. ssh.ts: host log + updated LLM_PID log. All via console.error. 1020 tests pass.

tasks.title: Verify Phase 2
tasks.notes: npm run build: 0 errors. npm test: 61 test files, 1020 passed, 7 skipped, 0 failures. Confirmed no console.log in changed files. Secret masking covers {{secure.*}} and sec:// patterns. All logging via console.error.

tasks.title: SKILL.md unattended='auto' provider table
tasks.notes: Replaced blanket 'auto does not add any CLI flag' statement with a 4-row provider table (Claude/Gemini/Codex/Copilot) covering both 'auto' and 'dangerous' flags.

tasks.title: Add credential_store_update to SKILL.md tools table
tasks.notes: Added credential_store_update row after credential_store_delete in the Core Fleet Tools table.

tasks.title: Document Copilot unattended limitation in SKILL.md
tasks.notes: Copilot row in T1 table already carries '⚠️ Not supported — warns and runs interactively' for both auto and dangerous modes. Standalone callout not needed — table entry is unambiguous.
